## type [BadgerStore](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/cache/cache.go#L60-L62>)

BadgerStore is a badger\-backed persistent cache.

```go
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

```go
func (s *BadgerStore) Clear() error
```

Clear removes all entries from the cache.

```go
func (s *BadgerStore) Get(key string, destination any) (bool, error)
```

Get returns true when the key exists and destination was populated.

<a name="BadgerStore.List"></a>
### func \(\*BadgerStore\) [List](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/cache/cache.go#L187>)

```go
func (s *BadgerStore) List(prefix string) ([]Entry, error)
```

List returns cache entries matching the provided prefix. When prefix is empty, all entries are returned.

```go
func (s *BadgerStore) SetWithTTL(key string, value any, ttl time.Duration) error
```

SetWithTTL stores a value with an optional TTL.

<a name="Entry"></a>
## type [Entry](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/cache/cache.go#L30-L35>)

Entry represents a cache entry with metadata.

```go
type Entry struct {
    Key       string          `json:"key"`
    Value     json.RawMessage `json:"value,omitempty"`
    ExpiresAt *time.Time      `json:"expiresAt,omitempty"`
    SizeBytes int             `json:"sizeBytes"`
}
```

```go
type Option func(*options)
```

<a name="Store"></a>
## type [Store](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/cache/cache.go#L20-L27>)

Store is a persistent cache interface for internal consumers.

```go
type Store interface {
    Get(key string, destination any) (bool, error)
    SetWithTTL(key string, value any, ttl time.Duration) error
    Delete(key string) error
    List(prefix string) ([]Entry, error)
    Clear() error
    Close() error
}
```
